title: What is your next birth? |  BG 8 05 - 8.08 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So, this is text 5 from the 8th chapter of the Gita.
Translation, and whoever at the time of death quits his body, remembering me alone, at once
attains my nature, of this there is no doubt.
So, we had discussed in our previous session, we all have an understanding of
the
what it means to be successful, what is real success, when can we say that we have led
this human life meaningfully.
So here the Lord is saying, the real success is if you could leave this body as a self-realized
soul remembering the Supreme Lord.
We all
are bound and entangled in this material world with various attachments, with different kinds
of desires, different attachments.
So if we have led a life whereby we have got purified of all those desires, developed right
kinds of attachment, then it is possible that at point of death we remember the Lord with
a focused mind.
Translation, and whoever at the time of death quits his body, remembering me alone, at once
attains my nature, of this there is no doubt.
And if we do that, whatever our state of mind, our consciousness at the point of death,
that determines our next life.
The 84 lakh species of life, plants, birds, aquatics, reptiles, different kinds of we
see people, you know, so based on our desires we get appropriate body.
The soul gets appropriate body.
So if we have material desires, we get a material body.
An appropriate body for the fulfillment of those desires.
And if we have spiritual desires, purified desires, we are thinking of the Lord, we get
a spiritual body.
And we come out of this material existence.
This material bondage, this cycle of birth, death, old age and disease, which is also
called Mukti or Moksha.
So here the Lord is saying, one who quits his body, remembering me at once, attains my
nature.
My nature means spiritual nature.
Of this there is no doubt.
Whatever state of being one remembers, when he quits his body, that state he will attain
without fail.
So if we are too conscious of attached to a particular object, or a particular thing,
or a particular person, or a particular desire, then accordingly we get another body, to fulfill
those desires.
Therefore, Arjuna, you should always think of me.
This process of Krishna Consciousness is we have to cultivate the remembrance of the Lord.
Suddenly the remembrance will not come at the point of death.
Yes.
Yes.
Yes.
Yes.
Yes.
Yes.

They say practice makes a man perfect. Just like cricketers we see before a match they are practicing. They are practicing. They are on the nets. Practice is going on. There is a coach who is teaching the people how to bat, how to ball for a normal material thing.

So likewise we have to practice this chanting what we do. It's a practice. Mind is not willing to remember the Lord. Mind is absorbed in so many things. But by force we try to pull the mind back, pull the mind back, pull the mind back. Mind is attached to so many things. Not this, this, not this, this.
And then if we have sufficiently practiced, if we have got purified, then it will be seamless, effortless to remember the Lord.

And that's why you are saying therefore, because that's the end goal, therefore Arjuna you should always think of me in the form of Krishna and at the same time carry out your prescribed duty of fighting.

There is a struggle. Remembrance is not easy. If we have struggled to remember the Lord while we are in this material existence, then at the point of death, which will be a painful moment, we have to leave everything and go. There is a good possibility that we will be able to remember the Lord.

Sometimes people say, life is a lot of struggle. Yes, while we are struggling, we have to strive. We have to practice remembering the Lord. When it is difficult to remember the Lord, we have to remember.
So acharyas what they have given, knowing that it is not easy for us to remember the Lord always, they have given us a process of sadhna bhakti.
Sadhana bhakti means it is not necessary.
spontaneous. Rules and regulations. Even if you don't like, do this much. When a person
is having jaundice, he doesn't like sugar. It looks, it tastes bitter. But the doctor
says, please take sugarcane juice. When the jaundice, the person recovers, the same sugarcane
juice becomes sweet. So right now when we start, because we have no taste for the Lord's
name, we have taste for various material things, this holy name, chanting of the holy
name, remembering of the Lord will look very, not normal, tasteless, not easy. It will be
painful. There is no maja. There is no taste because we haven't cultivated that taste.
So when I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college, I was in college,
So, all along, you know, when we were young, so we were Gold Spot, Fanta, those cold drinks
used to be there and so typically we knew that, okay, Gold Spot, if it was 5 rupees
a bottle and then, you know, this was relatively very expensive.
So, as a child, what comes in your mind?
You think it's much more sweeter, isn't it?
Gold Spot is sweet, so if it is more expensive, it will be much more sweeter, much more tastier.
That's why people are paying higher price.
So first time, when I was in the final year, somebody, you know, just somehow, just once
said, so I thought, okay, all along, so long, let me just, and it was so bitter, so bitter.
There's no taste.
Those people who have developed the taste, they would hanker for it.
They want it, they love it, they like it.
So at the same time, carry out your prescribed duty of fighting with your activities dedicated
to me.
We have to learn the art, how what we are doing can be done as a service to the Lord.
And your mind and intelligence fixed on me.
You will attain me.
Without doubt.
So this is what we should be, the Lord is giving us what we should be aspiring for.
What is the project for us?
We all have some goals, some aspirations, something which we are wanting to do.
So here the Lord is saying, something which you should, which is really worthwhile aspiring
for is this, while you are doing your prescribed duty, thinking of me, keeping your mind and
intelligence fixed on me.
Okay, you have to get your work done.
And I'm going to tell you the way.
Do
the last three sentences, and then go somewhere else.
And my help should be in a fixing of my mind and focus.
Why?
Because I believe that your mind is moving on something which makes you keep.
You tell me that by focusing on what you are depressed doing…
You will income yourself and others, anything and everything.
from the path, we get deviated because we have a lot of material desires.
We come here on Sunday and go somewhere else from Monday to Friday.
Yes, because we have different desires.
So this is, one is sure to reach me.
